data.title: DHL suspends U.S. shipments due to customs chaos after Trump removed exemption on tariffs for goods under $800.
data.description: One of the leading global courier services has decided to suspend its operations following President Trump's removal of an exemption on tariffs for items worth less than $800 being imported. This decision comes as a response to the new tariff regulations set by the President.

data.title: Fed governor Lisa Cook facing mortgage fraud allegations; Trump admin calls for resignation.
data.description: Officials from the Trump administration have accused the Federal Reserve governor of engaging in mortgage fraud. They have urged for her resignation following these allegations.

data.title: Investment bank Cantor Fitzgerald initiates coverage on ACG Metals with 'Buy (Speculative)' rating.
data.description: ACG Metals Ltd. revealed on August 22, 2025, that Cantor Fitzgerald Canada Corporation has begun equity research coverage on the Company. This move signifies a significant development for ACG as Cantor is a renowned global investment bank. The initiation of equity research coverage by Cantor will provide crucial insights and analysis on ACG's performance and growth prospects moving forward. This strategic partnership highlights the Company's growing presence in the market and indicates a positive outlook for investors and stakeholders.

data.title: Trump extends TikTok ban to mid-September unless ownership changes. This is the fourth delay in taking action.
data.description: The popular short-video platform has been granted until mid-September to modify its ownership model or risk being prohibited in the United States. President Trump has given several extensions to the initial deadline.

data.title: Workday stock down 3.64% to $219.30 despite strong Q2 results. Analysts lower price targets but maintain positive ratings.
data.description: Workday Inc's shares on NASDAQ dropped by 3.64% to $219.30 despite a strong fiscal second-quarter report. Analysts responded with varying sentiments, with BofA Securities maintaining a Buy rating but reducing the price target from $278 to $265. KeyBanc Capital Markets slashed the price target from $325 to $285 but retained an Overweight rating. Canaccord Genuity reduced the price target from $330 to $275 while retaining a Buy rating. RBC Capital Markets reiterated an Outperform rating with a price target of $340. Guggenheim Securities analyst John DiFucci maintained a Neutral rating. Workday’s Q2 results showed a 400 basis points operating margin expansion to 29%, and strong revenue growth fueled by existing base and net new ACV, with AI-driven ACV doubling year-on-year. Sills noted the strength of Workday's platform. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fed Chairman faces pressure at Jackson Hole Economic Policy Symposium, a key monetary retreat. Trump pushing for rate cuts as Powell juggles politics, markets, Fed renovations. Wyoming summit crucial in shaping global markets since 1978. (Words: 99)
data.description: Jerome Powell, the Federal Reserve chairman, faces significant pressure and scrutiny leading up to the Jackson Hole Economic Policy Symposium on August 22. President Trump is pushing for interest-rate cuts, Congress is questioning Fed independence, and there's criticism over a costly renovation of the Fed's headquarters. Trump and his allies are endorsing a successor who promises further rate cuts in 2026. The symposium, located in Jackson Hole, Wyoming, has become the focal point of global monetary policy debates since 1982 when it was moved from Kansas to attract Fed Chair Paul Volcker. The summit serves as a platform for central bankers to introduce new ideas. Key figures include the date of the symposium, August 22, the mention of interest-rate cuts, Trump's influence, the Fed's headquarters renovation, and the historic significance of the Jackson Hole Symposium.

data.title: KitchenAid launches collection of cookware featuring forest-green hues, bronze handles, and real walnut tools.
data.description: KitchenAid, in partnership with Meyer Corporation, has introduced a new collection of cookware that captures the essence of nature with its rich forest-green colors, sophisticated bronze handles, and authentic walnut tools. Based in Benton Harbor, Michigan, the launch took place on August 22, 2025. This collaboration brings together two major players in the industry to create a visually stunning and functional cookware set that embodies the beauty of the natural world.

data.title: SC indicates specific reasons to protect Fed from political meddling. Can Trump dismiss a Fed governor?
data.description: The Supreme Court has suggested that there are specific reasons to protect the Federal Reserve from political influence.

data.title: Inventor from Farmersburg, Ind. develops SAFETY WHEELS for dirt bikes after grandson's incidents.
data.description: A resident of Farmersburg, Indiana, mentioned that the idea for SAFETY WHEELS came about when his grandson's dirt bike training wheels were breaking frequently. Seeking a more robust and durable alternative, the inventor created SAFETY WHEELS. The innovative design aims to enhance safety for young riders undergoing training. The invention was unveiled in Pittsburgh on August 22, 2025, with the inventor highlighting its potential benefits for addressing concerns related to the durability of training wheels.
